---
title: 'Dear Her'
date: '2019-07-26T08:45:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1398236301014927894'
blogger_filename: '/2019/07/dear-her_11.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Her'
---

<div class="WordSection1">
<div class="MsoNormal">
Wouldn’t it be interesting if your name was Brooke? <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Like a babbling brook. Because you talk as much as I do, but you soothe my soul like a brook or stream? It was just a random thought I just had. Probably not, but I think that’s what I want. I want someone who makes me feel calmer not more anxious or tight or eager to impress… someone who makes me feel relaxed, at ease, peaceful, who calms my already tense soul tendencies.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Even if your name isn’t Brooke, can I nickname you Brooke for that reason? Or maybe something calm/water/river ish?  <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Hm…. Something to think about.</div>
</div>
